title: Bamboo Pizza Cutting Board | 33cm Serving Pizza Tray with 6 Groove Guides | Serving Platter | Round Board
features: Premium Bamboo Construction: Crafted from high-quality, eco-friendly bamboo, this cutting board is not only durable but the natural properties of bamboo make it a sustainable and hygienic choice.
Optimal Size: With a generous diameter of 33cm, our pizza board is perfect for serving medium to large pizzas. The ample surface area the pizza boards offer allows for easy slicing.
Six Groove Guides: Achieve perfectly even slices every time with the six precision groove guides. Whether you prefer traditional or creative toppings, these guides ensure that each slice is even.
Versatile Design: Beyond a pizza plate, this board doubles as a stylish serving platter for cheese, charcuterie, and other appetizers or simply turn over and use as a round chopping board
Serving Board: Designed to serve pizzas with ease, this board provides a spacious and stylish surface for cutting and presenting your favorite pizza slice to guests at your very own pizza table.

Versatile Round Cutting Board: Perfect for all your chopping, slicing, and prepping needs, this round board offers a spacious, durable surface for vegetables, meats, and more, adding a unique touch to your kitchen.
Easy Maintenance: The smooth bamboo surface is easy to clean and maintain. Simply hand wash with mild soap and water, and it's ready for your next culinary creation.

Not Oven or Fire Safe: To preserve the integrity and longevity of the wood, do not place the round wooden chopping board in the oven or near direct heat sources, including open flames or hot surfaces.
description: Enjoy the perfect slice every time with our Bamboo Pizza Cutting Board. Designed for pizza lovers, this 33cm serving tray is ideal for cutting and serving your favorite pizzas with ease and precision. Crafted from premium bamboo, known for its durability and eco-friendliness, this board combines functionality with a sleek, natural aesthetic that complements any kitchen or dining table. The unique 6 groove guides on the board ensure you get evenly sized slices every time. No more uneven cuts – simply follow the grooves to make perfect portions for you and your guests. The generous 33cm size comfortably fits large pizzas, providing ample space for slicing without spills or mess. The wooden pizza board is more than just a functional tool – it doubles as a stylish serving tray. Its beautiful bamboo finish adds a rustic charm to your dining experience, making it perfect for serving pizza, appetizers, or even as a charcuterie board for your next gathering. Bamboo is a sustainable material, naturally resistant to moisture, and gentle on your knives, helping to preserve their sharpness while providing a sturdy cutting surface. Easy to clean, simply wipe the board with a damp cloth after use and occasionally oil to maintain its natural beauty. One of the must have pizza making accessories, experience the perfect blend of style and functionality with the Magna Retail Bamboo Pizza Cutting Board. Order yours today and make every pizza party or night a gourmet affair!
